name: Mini Car Simulator
description: Experience the thrill of driving in Mini Car Simulator! Enjoy 40 exciting levels filled with fun challenges and obstacles. Explore three beautiful environments—busy city streets, peaceful forests, and sunny beach roads. Each level tests your driving skills as you navigate tight turns and tricky paths. With smooth controls and immersive gameplay, this game offers endless fun for players who love car simulation and adventure. Get ready to drive, explore, and master every level!
instructions: Mobile Controls Use on-screen buttons to move your car forward backward left and right Tap the booster button for extra speed Use the camera button to change different viewing angles while driving If your car gets stuck or crashes press the reborn
